disclaimer: Pilot data for governance review support only. Not legal advice. Not a compliance guarantee. Not complete global coverage. Sample records require human review before client use. Official sources control.

items.name: European Union
items.notes: Pilot jurisdiction for Caesar AI Regulation Watch. Tracks a curated subset of official and authoritative EU sources that helps identify regulatory changes relevant to AI governance review. Does not include all EU institutions, member-state implementations, or sector-specific rules unless added later. Changes surfaced here may affect controls or evidence only after human review; requires human review before client use.

items.name: Norway
items.notes: Pilot jurisdiction for Caesar AI Regulation Watch. Norway is an EEA country; EU AI Act-related obligations may apply via EEA incorporation on a different timeline than EU member states. This registry tracks selected official Norwegian sources only—not all ministries, agencies, or sector regulators. Norway is not part of the EU; related_frameworks (eu, eea) indicate where EEA/EØS incorporation of EU rules may be relevant for monitoring context only—not a legal determination. Supports governance review; may affect controls or evidence after human review. Requires human review before client use.
